summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 11→Jul 17 vs Jul 4→Jul 10* · Revenue +4% (1,117,155 vs 1,077,482 EGP) · Spend +0% · ROAS 5.81 (+3%).
   • CPC: 2.2 → 2.16 EGP (-2%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.09% → 0.98% (-10%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,135 → 1,283 EGP (+13%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 50%* of the move (helped, +128,908 EGP)  ·  *CVR 43%* of the move (hurt, -125,751 EGP)  ·  *CPC 7%* of the move (helped, +3,564 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +13%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *128,908 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +3%.
     Revenue +4% because spend +0%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *OURKIDS PJS SCALING LEBLEB MOA*, its AOV went 2856.6 EGP→1131.72 EGP on 6,039 EGP spend (~33% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 11→Jul 17 vs Jul 4→Jul 10* · Revenue +118% (218,184 vs 99,981 EGP) · Spend +93% · ROAS 4.33 (+13%).
   • CPC: 9.63 → 9.38 EGP (-3%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.81% → 2.53% (+40%, up (good))
   • AOV: 2,040 → 1,604 EGP (-21%, down (drag))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 56%* of the move (helped, +62,040 EGP)  ·  *AOV 40%* of the move (hurt, -59,296 EGP)  ·  *CPC 4%* of the move (helped, +1,343 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* rose +40%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *62,040 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS +13%.
     Revenue +118% because spend +93%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255290390850011|swimwear new arrivals black button grid>, its CVR went 0.0%→3.2% on 5,272 EGP spend (~41% of the swing).
